data.content:
## Run

From the repository root:

```bash
cd /home/smtx724/projects/big/bice
python3 run.py --dataset /path/to/dataset --port 8000
```

If you want to use the environment variable instead:

```bash
cd /home/smtx724/projects/big/bice
BICE_DATASET_PATH=/path/to/dataset python3 run.py --port 8000
```

If you only want the synthetic simulation and no dataset:

```bash
cd /home/smtx724/projects/big/bice
python3 run.py --port 8000
```

## Stop

If it is running in the foreground:
- Press `Ctrl+C`

If you started it in the background or need to kill the process:
```bash
pkill -f "uvicorn"
```

Or find the PID and kill it:
```bash
ps -ef | grep uvicorn
kill <PID>
```

> Note: this project uses `uvicorn` via `run.py`, so stopping `uvicorn` is the normal way to stop it.
